issue.title: Released with attempt fixture
issue.body: Thesis with an attempt then released as no_improvement

comments.body:
Polyresearch claim: thesis #30 by node `test-node`.

<!-- polyresearch:claim
thesis: 30
node: test-node
-->

Polyresearch attempt: thesis #30, branch `thesis/30-test-attempt-1`, metric `0.5000`, observation `no_improvement`.

<!-- polyresearch:attempt
thesis: 30
branch: thesis/30-test-attempt-1
metric: 0.5000
baseline_metric: 0.5000
observation: no_improvement
summary: No improvement found
-->

Polyresearch release: thesis #30 by node `test-node` (`reason: no_improvement`).

<!-- polyresearch:release
thesis: 30
node: test-node
reason: no_improvement
-->
